title: zelkova crenata
intro: Zelkova crenata, also known as Japanese zelkova or keyaki, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia, belonging to the family Ulmaceae. The tree's bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Zelkova crenata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Zelkova crenata can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
